title: stelis pristis
intro: Stelis pristis, also known as the goldenroot or goldenrod, is a flowering plant species belonging to the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis pristis include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Stelis pristis is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts are also used in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
